title: lepidocupania brackenridgei
intro: Lepidocupania brackenridgei is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the Melastome family. It is native to Hawaii and is recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throat, and skin infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and fighting off bacterial infections. Lepidocupania brackenridgei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
